message:
feat(migrate,guard,cli): timestamp migration scanner, guard slug-safety, CLI expansion, installer hardening

Broad quality pass across migration, guard enforcement, CLI, and
operational infrastructure.

Timestamp migration scanner (migrate.rs, +231):

- New ColumnTypeScan struct and scan_column_types() function that
  uses typeof() to probe actual stored types per timestamp column.
  Replaces the previous single-sample probe with a DISTINCT typeof
  scan that detects mixed TEXT/INTEGER columns. This correctly
  identifies databases that are partially migrated from Python-era
  TEXT timestamps to Rust-era INTEGER timestamps.

Guard slug-safety (guard/lib.rs, +117):

- New looks_like_project_slug() function that validates a value is
  not an absolute path before using it as a slug in archive path
  construction. Prevents absolute paths like /data/projects/foo from
  being treated as slugs, which would create incorrect archive paths.

- project_metadata_matches() now only compares slugs against slug-like
  values and paths against path-like values, preventing cross-type
  false matches.

- resolve_archive_root() filters explicit_names to exclude non-slug
  values before searching for matching archive directories.

CLI expansion (cli/lib.rs, +245):

- Extended CLI command surface with additional subcommands and
  improved argument handling.

Server and tools refinements:

- server/lib.rs (+98): Additional operator loop handling and
  snapshot publication improvements.
- mail_ui.rs: Minor TUI display adjustment.
- startup_checks.rs (+31): Extended startup validation.
- share/probe.rs (+46): Probe logic refinements.
- storage/lib.rs (+33): Storage layer improvements.
- macros.rs (+12): Tool macro refinements.
- resources.rs: Resource handler adjustment.

Installer (install.sh, +11):

- Hardened installation script with additional safety checks.

Also updates .gitignore with additional ephemeral patterns and
beads issue tracker metadata.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -104,6 +104,17 @@ ci-artifacts/
 proptest-regressions/
 test_meminfo
 
+# Compiled test binaries (accidentally committed, should never be tracked)
+migrate_bug_test
+parser_bug_test
+s3fifo_test
+s3fifo_leak_test
+test_glob
+test_panic
+ammonia_bug_test
+test_output.txt
+tmp.json
+
 # Remote compilation helper artifacts
 rch-artifacts/
 target-rch-release/

@@ -4599,13 +4599,11 @@ if [ -n "$PYTHON_DB_MIGRATED_PATH" ] && [ -f "$PYTHON_DB_MIGRATED_PATH" ]; then
     if printf "%s\n" "$migration_output" | grep -qiE "schema migration hit sqlite engine instability|schema migration path was skipped due to backend instability"; then
       migration_requires_fallback=1
     fi
+    info "Database migration command completed; verifying results"
     if [ "$migration_has_unresolved_warnings" -eq 1 ]; then
-      ok "Database schema migrated"
       warn "Database migration completed with unresolved warnings."
       warn "Review migration output with --verbose and retry if needed:"
       warn "  AM_INTERFACE_MODE=cli DATABASE_URL=sqlite:///$PYTHON_DB_MIGRATED_PATH am migrate --force"
-    else
-      ok "Database schema migrated"
     fi
     migration_succeeded=1
   elif migration_output_fallback=$(AM_INTERFACE_MODE=cli DATABASE_URL="sqlite+aiosqlite:///$PYTHON_DB_MIGRATED_PATH" "$DEST/$BIN_CLI" migrate --force 2>&1); then
@@ -4627,13 +4625,11 @@ if [ -n "$PYTHON_DB_MIGRATED_PATH" ] && [ -f "$PYTHON_DB_MIGRATED_PATH" ]; then
     if printf "%s\n%s\n" "$migration_output" "$migration_output_fallback" | grep -qiE "schema migration hit sqlite engine instability|schema migration path was skipped due to backend instability"; then
       migration_requires_fallback=1
     fi
+    info "Database migration command completed; verifying results"
     if [ "$migration_has_unresolved_warnings" -eq 1 ]; then
-      ok "Database schema migrated"
       warn "Database migration completed with unresolved warnings."
       warn "Review migration output with --verbose and retry if needed:"
       warn "  AM_INTERFACE_MODE=cli DATABASE_URL=sqlite:///$PYTHON_DB_MIGRATED_PATH am migrate --force"
-    else
-      ok "Database schema migrated"
     fi
     migration_succeeded=1
   else
@@ -4742,6 +4738,9 @@ if [ -n "$PYTHON_DB_MIGRATED_PATH" ] && [ -f "$PYTHON_DB_MIGRATED_PATH" ]; then
       migration_succeeded=0
       warn "Final migration verification detected reduced core legacy row counts."
     fi
+    if [ "$migration_succeeded" -eq 1 ]; then
+      ok "Database schema migrated"
+    fi
   fi
 
   if [ -n "$migration_pristine_backup" ] && [ -f "$migration_pristine_backup" ]; then
